title: Grey Squadron
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Gray Squadron}} {{Organization |image=[[File:Grey_squadron_formation.jpg]] |name=Grey Squadron |type= |founder=*[[X2]] *[[Rahm Kota/Legends|Rahm Kota]] |leader=X2 |subgroup= |headquarters= |locations= |formed=[[Geonosis strike team (Rebel)|Geonosis strike team]] |founded=Between [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] and [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] }} {{Quote|I knew a man once who redeemed himself by helping others…He'd be honored if you remembered him by continuing to help others as he always wished.''"
"''Then we'll name ourselves after him…Grey. We'll be known as Grey Squadron.|Rahm Kota and X2, naming Grey Squadron in honor of Falon Grey|''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]''}} '''Grey Squadron''' was a military unit within the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] which was formed during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and were led by former [[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone trooper]] [[X2]]. The squadron was named after X2's [[Clone template/Legends|genetic father]], the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Falon Grey]]. Grey Squadron fought in many battles against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Imperial Remnant]], including the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. Their primary [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was the [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] just like [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], another squadron in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Grey Squadron originated from the [[Geonosis strike team (Rebel)]], which failed in their attempt to infiltrate an Imperial outpost there. They were held captive until X2 was sent by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Rahm Kota/Legends|Rahm Kota]] to rescue them, resulting in the unit's sworn allegiance to X2. They went on to take part in a multitude of battles against Imperial forces and participated in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] where, after discovering the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] was operational, they were tasked with the defense of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Home One/Legends|Home One]]. During this time, Rahm Kota introduced [[Shara]], a former [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] to the squad. During a mission to [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]], an Imperial saboteur planted [[detonation pack]]s on the squadron's X-Wings, resulting in heavy casualties of the unit. X2 nearly killed the Imperial in revenge, but stopped when Shara reminded him that he should not follow down X1's dark path. ==History== ===The beginning=== {{Quote|Looks like you have a new squadron, X2, whether you like it or not.|Rahm Kota|}} In [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] was formed to fight the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. One of the earliest members of the Rebellion was [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Rahm Kota/Legends|Rahm Kota]], a survivor of the Great Jedi Purge. Some time later, Kota was sent to the planet [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] to recruit his former Padawan, [[Falon Grey]], to the cause. However, upon arrival he discovered only [[X2]], a clone of Grey, while Grey himself had been killed years earlier by another of his clones, X1. Sensing the Force resonating in X2, General Kota offered him to join the Rebellion, and the latter agreed. Around this time, the Alliance dispatched a strike team to the planet [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] to infiltrate an old Imperial droid foundry. However, the team was captured on account of their large numbers. === Members === * Grey Leader - X2 * [[Shara]] * [[Tavoy]] * [[Watkins]] * [[Ryder]] ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Grey-Staffel }} [[Category:Alliance to Restore the Republic military units]]
